headline: {CITY} TURNS ON {GOV}
deck: Recall petition succeeds as approval collapses to {approval}%. The administration ends weeks short of its term.
pull: We gave them the keys and they drove us into the ditch. We want them back.

headline: {GOV} RESIGNS UNDER SCANDAL
deck: Facing exposure, the governor stepped down before {city} could finish the job. {crises} crises, one fatal mistake.
pull: The cover-up was always going to cost more than the crime.

headline: {GOV} EXITS TO PROMOTION
deck: {city} closes the books at {approval}% approval. Higher office reportedly beckons the outgoing governor.
pull: Say what you will — the lights stayed on and the books balanced.

headline: {GOV} WALKS AWAY
deck: The governor resigned voluntarily after {weeks} weeks, leaving {city} to sort out what comes next.
pull: Better to leave on your own terms than be shown the door.

headline: {GOV} TERM ENDS QUIETLY
deck: A full term concludes in {city} at {approval}% approval. No parades, no riots — just the slow turn of the page.
pull: They came, they governed, they left. The city barely noticed.
